Description:
Face aux crises climatique et énergétique, Otrera s’engage à construire une nouvelle filière nucléaire d’excellence.

L'objectif est de doter la France et l’Europe d’une solution énergétique bas carbone, compétitive et souveraine, tout en créant des emplois hautement qualifiés et en renforçant notre compétitivité sur la scène internationale.

Le réacteur conceptualisé par Otrera repose sur des avancées technologiques de rupture, lui conférant une efficacité unique et une polyvalence d’utilisation adaptée aux défis de la transition énergétique pour garantir une énergie à un prix juste. 

Grâce à la technologie des Sodium Fast Reactors (SFR), OTRERA capitalise sur un savoir-faire français reconnu mondialement. Cette technologie de 4e génération, la plus mature et la seule exploitée industriellement, permet non seulement de recycler les combustibles nucléaires usés, mais aussi de valoriser et réduire ses propres déchets.

En intégrant innovation, durabilité et expertise, Otrera entend redéfinir le nucléaire pour répondre aux besoins des industries et des territoires de demain.

Name: Türkiye Nükleer Enerji A.Ş.
Description:
Türkiye Nükleer Enerji A.Ş., established in 2015 by the Council of Ministers resolution with the vision of transferring new technologies in the nuclear field to our country, commenced its activities in September 2016. The main target of Türkiye Nükleer Enerji A.Ş is to realize nuclear power plant new build projects in international partnerships. Developing a domestic nuclear supply chain and a local human capital in the quality and quantity capable of meeting the needs of the projects are also among the targets of Türkiye Nükleer Enerji A.Ş.

While Türkiye Nükleer Enerji A.Ş is solely responsible for the planning phase of new nuclear power plants, it will share the responsibility during the development, construction, and operation phases with its international partners.
The planning phase of such long-run projects requires comprehensive work and preparations as follows;

(1) Evaluation of the feasibility of new nuclear technologies and projects,
(2) Investigation and licensing of sites foreseen for nuclear power plant new build projects in compliance with international standards and national legislation,
(3) Establishing partnership with international nuclear organizations for exchange of knowledge, best practices and experiences in the journey toward excellence in nuclear safety and reliability,
(4) Establishing the technical basis of the contracts that constitute the framework and content of nuclear power plant new build projects,
(5) Development of basic planning instruments (owner’s requirements, skills matrix, nuclear training center development plan, nuclear supplier development plan etc.) necessary for the realization of new nuclear power plant new build projects,
(6) Establishing state-of-the-art infrastructure systems of Türkiye Nükleer Enerji A.Ş.

Name: RoPower Nuclear
Description: Dezvoltăm prima centrală SMR din Europa - un proiect strategic pentru reenergizarea României.

Name: PowerForce Global
Description:
We are a global provider of flexible and robust Field Service solutions to Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) and Plant Owners across the Energy & Utilities sector.

Our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction is evident in the quality of our work and the high level of service we provide. We are dedicated to ensuring you have the right team to help your global projects run smoothly.

PowerForce Global has been a trusted partner in the energy industry, providing unparalleled support to maintenance activities.

Our team of experienced professionals has a proven track record of supporting OEMs keep the uptime of gas & steam turbines, generators, pumps & motors, compressors packages and auxiliary systems.

We help reduce maintenance costs, and improve operational efficiency. 

Let us help you get the most out of your rotating and static mechanical equipment!

Name: OKG
Description:
OKG was founded in 1965 and today owns and operates three nuclear reactor units – Oskarshamn 1, 2 and 3 – which together account for ten per cent of the total electricity generation in Sweden.

OKG presently has approximately 850 employees and an annual turnover of around SEK 3 billion.

The plant is located on the Swedish east coast, 30 kms north of Oskarshamn. Oskarshamn 1, also Sweden's first commercial nuclear power unit, was commissioned in 1972. Oskarshamn 2 has been in operation since 1974 and Oskarshamn 3 was put into commercial operation in 1985.

Each reactor is shut down every year for three to six weeks for maintenance, safety system control and replacement of 20 per cent of the fuel elements. These planned outages normally occur between May and September. The total plant investment at Oskarshamn is approximately SEK 20 billion.

The village of Simpevarp is situated at the centre of the industrial site. Some of the 18th century houses in the village have been reverentially restored by OKG. The buildings and houses are now used as accommodation for visitors, for conferences, for education, company health care and information purposes.

Name: Rosatom Egypt
Description:
Rosatom is one of the global leaders in the world nuclear technology market, providing international partners with advanced technological solutions and offering comprehensive support for sustainable regional development. 
Rosatom is the only company in the world that has competencies in the entire technological chain of the nuclear fuel cycle, from the extraction of natural uranium to the final stage of the life cycle of nuclear facilities. 
The scope of Rosatom's activities also includes the production of innovative nuclear and non-nuclear products, scientific research, development of the Northern Sea Route and environmental projects. The products and services of nuclear industry enterprises are supplied to more than 50 countries around the world.
Rosatom inaugurated its country office in Cairo, Egypt in 2023 to expand collaboration with potential partners in the local market. This office operates under the following main goals:
 support ongoing activities of Rosatom and its subsidiaries globally,
 search for new business opportunities of cooperation with global and regional companies,
 assistance in building efficient business alliances,
 promotion of Rosatom portfolio of products and solutions in diverse sectors,
 marketing and informational support.

Name: Net Zero Nuclear
Description:
Net Zero Nuclear is an initiative to drive action and advocacy – promoting the value of nuclear technology for accelerating our path to Net Zero 2050.

Net Zero Nuclear calls for unprecedented collaboration between government and industry leaders to triple global nuclear capacity to achieve carbon neutrality by 2050.

It is time to act. And we have the tools we need.

Name: Dalkia EN
Description: Sur les centrales nucléaires du groupe EDF, nous intervenons sur tous les types de bâtiments, à la fois de production et tertiaires. Nous réalisons la maintenance des systèmes de ventilation et de production de froid, des groupes électrogènes de secours et des systèmes de traitement de l’eau et électriques des centrales. Nous assurons la conception et la réalisation d'équipements dans les domaines HVAC et diesel. Nous gérons aussi la maintenance multitechnique. Dans le cadre de la stratégie du groupe EDF, Dalkia entend ainsi contribuer au développement d'une énergie d'avenir sans CO2.

Name: TSM ENERJİ
Description:
Akkuyu Nükleer Güç Santrali / Ana Yüklenici Firma
Akkuyu Nuclear Power Plant / Main Contractor
АЭС «Аккую» / Генеральный подрядчик

Name: Blue Energy
Description: Blue Energy is a nuclear power plant company that provides reliable, clean, and abundant electricity.

Name: CEFRI
Description:
Le Comité français de certification des Entreprises pour la Formation et le suivi du personnel travaillant sous Rayonnements Ionisants associe :
- les Exploitants : CEA, Orano, la Défense et EDF,
- le Groupe Intersyndical de l'Industrie Nucléaire : GIIN,
- l'Institut de Radioprotection et de Sûreté Nucléaire : IRSN,
- la Société Française de Radioprotection : SFRP,
- la Caisse Nationale d'Assurance Maladie des Travailleurs Salariés : CNAMTS,
- les Médecins du Travail.

Le Ministère du Travail et le Ministère de l'Industrie ont témoigné de leur accord et de leur soutien à la création du CEFRI.

Name: North American Young Generation in Nuclear, Inc. (Continental)
Description:
NAYGN, together with its constituent local chapters, provides opportunities for a young generation of nuclear enthusiasts to develop leadership and professional skills, create life-long connections, engage and inform the public, and inspire today’s nuclear technology professionals to meet the challenges of the 21st century.

Contact: Info@NAYGN.org

Name: Paks II. Nuclear Power Plant Ltd.
Description:
The main objective of the Paks II. Nuclear Power Plant (Paks II. Ltd.) is to prepare the construction of the new nuclear power plant units of Paks, obtain the necessary licenses, carry out the investment and then operate the new units.

The Paks II. project will make a significant contribution to the growth of the national economy and to maintaining a secure, affordable and climate-friendly electricity supply for Hungary.


A Paks II. Atomerőmű Zártkörűen Működő Részvénytársaság (Paks II. Zrt.) fő célja az új paksi telephelyű atomerőművi blokkok létesítésének előkészítése, a szükséges engedélyek beszerzése, a beruházás lebonyolítása, majd az új blokkok üzemeltetése.

A Paks II. projekt jelentősen hozzájárul a nemzetgazdaság növekedéséhez, illetve Magyarország biztonságos, megfizethető árú és klímabarát villamosenergia-ellátásának fenntartásához.

Name: Nuklearna elektrarna Krško, Slovenija
Description:
Pomemben delež električne energije za Slovenijo in Hrvaško

NEK kot skupen proizvodni objekt letno pokriva približno 20 odstotkov potreb Slovenije in 16 odstotkov potreb Hrvaške po električni energiji. Z zanesljivostjo in konkurenčnostjo proizvodnje v primerjavi z ostalimi viri bistveno prispevamo k ugodnemu položaju slovenskega in hrvaškega gospodarstva ter sprejemljivi ravni energetske neodvisnosti obeh držav.

NEK je začela komercialno obratovati 1983. Z nenehnim izpopolnjevanjem organizacije, optimizacijo delovnih procesov, stalnim usposabljanjem in tehnološko nadgradnjo smo v zadnjih desetletjih povprečje proizvodnje s 4,5 teravatne ure zvišali na 5,6 teravatne ure. Že desetletja dokazujemo, da je jedrska energija zanesljiva ter okolju in podnebju prijazna, saj obratujemo stabilno in brez izpustov toplogrednih plinov.

Za več informacij obiščite www.nek.si

Name: Elementl Power
Description:
𝗘𝗹𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗹 𝗣𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿 𝗜𝗻𝗰. is an advanced nuclear project developer and independent power producer, building scalable pathways for clean resilient energy. We break the stalemate in advanced nuclear deployment by delivering turnkey development, financing, and ownership solutions—empowering customers to access nuclear power without the burden of operating assets. 

Our procurement model engages some of the world’s largest energy buyers to drive a sustainable, safe, and energy-abundant future. Backed by Breakwater North, a nuclear and critical infrastructure investment firm, and Energy Impact Partners (EIP), a global investor in energy innovation, we combine deep sector expertise with the capital and partnerships needed to accelerate nuclear deployment. 

𝗪𝗲’𝗿𝗲 𝗯𝘂𝗶𝗹𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗵𝗮𝗻 𝗽𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿.
𝗪𝗲’𝗿𝗲 𝗯𝘂𝗶𝗹𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗯𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝘁𝗲𝗮𝗺𝘀 𝗶𝗻 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗶𝗻𝗱𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘆.

Over the next several months, we’re expanding in project management, finance, safety, communications, licensing, legal and more, seeking exceptional leaders and specialists ready to shape the future of nuclear energy. Even if the right role isn’t posted today, more opportunities are just ahead.

Name: Terra Innovatum - SOLO
Description:
Terra Innovatum (TINN) is a pioneering force in the energy sector, dedicated to delivering innovative and sustainable power solutions. As the parent company of SOLO, TINN leverages cutting-edge nuclear technology through the SOLO Micro-Modular Reactor (SMR) to provide efficient, safe, and environmentally conscious energy. With a mission to address global energy shortages, TINN combines extensive expertise in nuclear industry design, manufacturing, and installation licensing to offer disruptive and immediate solutions. Committed to propelling technological advancements, Terra Innovatum and SOLO are dedicated to fostering prosperity and sustainability for humankind.

SOLO (2028), the world’s only commercially deployable Micro Modular Nuclear Reactor to this day, is set to be available globally within the next four years. Conceptualized in 2018 and engineered over five years by experts in nuclear safety, licensing, innovation, and R&D, SOLO addresses pressing global energy demands with a market-ready solution. Built from readily available commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) components, SOLO’s proven licensing path enables rapid deployment and minimizes supply chain risks, ensuring final cost predictability. Designed to adapt with evolving fuel options, SOLO supports both LEU+ and HALEU, offering the only platform ready to transition to future fuel supplies.

Name: KURY UK
Description:
KURY UK is 100% dedicated to the civil nuclear industry. Our team of engineers supports major Energy companies in delivering nuclear power plant projects in two main technical sectors: 
→ DESIGN (electrical, I&C, HVAC, Fluids systems) 
→ SAFETY (hazards studies, safety reports, operating procedures) 

As a part of KURY Groupe, we have the ability to import our nuclear expertise gained over +25 years on new-build projects like FA3 EPR, Taishan EPR, HPC EPR, and our involvement in the maintenance of French reactors. 
Our goal is to bring international nuclear specialists to develop the local team we are setting in the UK.

Name: Deep Fission
Description: At Deep Fission, we're reimagining nuclear power with a bold new approach: placing small modular reactors (SMRs) a mile underground for cheaper, faster, and more scalable deployment. Our mission is to power humanity from a mile underground. We want to leave the world a better place than we found it.

Name: Centrales Nucleares Almaraz-Trillo, AIE
Description: Centrales Nucleares Almaraz-Trillo, AIE se encarga de la operación, gestión y administración integradas de las centrales nucleares de Almaraz y Trillo.

Name: Associazione Italiana Nucleare
Description:
L’Associazione Italiana Nucleare (AIN) è un’associazione tecnico-scientifica no-profit dotata di personalità giuridica che rappresenta tutti i centri di competenza esistenti in Italia nel campo dell’energia e delle tecnologie nucleari.

È stata istituita a Roma il 12 novembre 1958 come FIEN (Forum Italiano dell’Energia Nucleare) e ha operato come tale fino al 31 dicembre 1998, data nella quale le tre associazioni storiche fino a quel momento attive in Italia in campo nucleare – FIEN (Forum Italiano dell’Energia Nucleare), ANDIN (Associazione Nazionale di Ingegneria Nucleare) e SNI (Società Nucleare Italiana) – sono confluite nell’AIN.

La nuova associazione ha ottenuto il riconoscimento di personalità giuridica il 14 settembre 2005 con iscrizione al n. 355/2005 del Registro delle Persone Giuridiche. In tale veste è abilitata all’interlocuzione e alla collaborazione con le Istituzioni dello Stato.

L’AIN è espressamente costituita come ente culturale non commerciale e non ispirato a fini di lucro.

È libera, apartitica e aconfessionale e si propone, nell’interesse e per il progresso civile del Paese, di costituire un punto d’incontro, di discussione e di unione tra quanti sono interessati allo sviluppo delle applicazioni pacifiche dell’energia e della tecnologia nucleare in armonia con le norme di sicurezza internazionali e nazionali e con il trattato EURATOM.

L’Associazione si propone in particolare di elaborare e rappresentare, in sede nazionale e internazionale, posizioni e opinioni qualificate concernenti le iniziative e i problemi nucleari, nonché di mantenere i rapporti con gli enti nazionali, internazionali e sopranazionali del settore nucleare e con le organizzazioni similari esistenti in altri paesi.

L’AIN rappresenta il sistema nucleare italiano in seno alla European Nuclear Society (ENS) e al Forum Atomico Europeo (FORATOM).

Name: Altra
Description:
Welcome to the Ignalina Nuclear Power Plant page 

We are implementing one of the most complex environmental megaprojects in Lithuania’s energy sector — the decommissioning of the former Ignalina Nuclear Power Plant. Our work includes the safe management of radioactive waste and the development of long-term storage infrastructure. We are committed to ensuring a safe, clean, and sustainable future for Lithuania.

We are the architects of the country’s nuclear transformation — and our new activity name is Altra.

Name: Next Gen Nuclear Industry Council
Description: The Next Gen Nuclear Industry Council vision is to inspire the next generation to champion a thriving and inclusive sector that supports prosperity and a green transition, addressing global challenges.

Name: OAKRIDGE SAS
Description:
As a privately owned Consulting company, OAKRIDGE SAS is committed to advising Nuclear projects' leaders worldwide, with no conflict of interest. 
Its world-class nuclear experts are fully involved in their projects, showing an open-minded and a professional knowledge-sharing attitude with their counterparts.

People at OAKRIDGE work with a client-oriented mind, because they have embarked on a long term win-win business relationship. This is the reason why they strive to deliver the service on time at an efficient cost and a high quality level.

With Engineers from various countries, we have knowledge in PWR, BWR, PHWR, VVER and also GEN-IV technologies.

Name: Reuters Events Nuclear
Description:
Reuters Events Nuclear, formerly Nuclear Energy Insider, is a leading business intelligence provider that serves the global nuclear energy community. Focusing on the entire nuclear lifecycle, we help businesses address complex challenges and opportunities in plant construction, SMRs, O&M, plant digitalization, decommissioning and waste management. Our clients include utilities, operating companies, EPCs, OEMs, suppliers, government bodies, regulatory organizations and financial institutions.

Since 2010, Reuters Events Nuclear has created original content to help our community navigate potential threats and upcoming opportunities. Received by over 30,000 professionals globally, we do this through:

 - Interviews with industry experts
 - Project announcements & technology developments
 - Analysis & commentary on nuclear energy activities around the world

Our range of products and services include:

 - Bi-weekly news round up
 - Focused conferences and exhibitions
 - In–depth industry reports
 - Virtual conferences and workshops
 - Digital content opportunities

All of our services have been designed carefully to ensure that we are helping you reach your goals and targets as well as supporting your professional development within the nuclear industry.

Name: Clean Core Thorium Energy
Description:
At Clean Core, we recognize the need for an immediate nuclear innovation to solve the climate and human development challenges of today. 

We are achieving this mission through the development of advanced nuclear fuel for existing reactors. 

Our ANEEL fuel uses a proprietary combination of Thorium & enriched uranium to make operating reactors cheaper, cleaner, and safer.

Visit our website for recent press and contact information!

Name: SNETP
Description: Sustainable Nuclear Energy Technology Platform

Name: Pakistan Atomic Energy Commission
Description:
The Pakistan Atomic Energy Commission (PAEC) is the governmental scientific research institution and nuclear agency of Pakistan, responsible for overseeing the country's nuclear program. Established in 1956, PAEC primarily focuses on nuclear energy, nuclear safety, and nuclear medicine. It plays a significant role in the development of nuclear power plants, research reactors, and other nuclear applications in Pakistan. PAEC also engages in collaborations with other countries and international organizations for nuclear research and development.
Moreover, PAEC plays a significant role in nuclear electric power generation in Pakistan. PAEC operates several nuclear power plants across the country, which contribute to the national energy grid and help meet the growing demand for electricity.

Name: Energoatom
Description:
Joint Stock Company «National Nuclear Energy Generating Company «Energoatom» operating all four nuclear power plants in Ukraine – Zaporizhzhia NPP, Rivne NPP, South Ukraine NPP, and Khmelnytskyi NPP.
 
Energoatom – is the the largest power producer in Ukraine that operates 15 nuclear power units with a total installed capacity of 13,835 MW and provides about 55% of Ukraine's electricity needs.

As the operator of the Ukrainian NPP Energoatom ranks seventh in the world and second in Europe in terms of the number of nuclear reactors operated and total capacity. 

On March 4, 2022, the Russian army fired from heavy weapons and seized the site of the largest nuclear power plant in Europe - the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant.

Following the occupation, the russians deployed military and heavy equipment – trucks, tanks, infantry fighting vehicles, as well as ammunition and explosives, directly into the turbine halls of the Zaporizhzhia NPP creating hazard of major fire at these units. 

The crimes of the russian federation within the Zaporizhzhia NPP site highlight the very real risk of a nuclear and radiation disaster, which could threaten the health of the population and the environment in Ukraine, Europe and whole world. By shelling and seizure of Ukrainian nuclear facilities the russian federation violates all existing norms of international law, nuclear and radiation safety requirements, specifically the United Nations Charter and the IAEA Statute.

Name: Natura Resources
Description:
Natura Resources is committed to answering the world's increased demand for reliable energy, medical isotopes, and clean water by developing commercially deployable molten salt reactors.

Sustainability starts here. Natura Resources welcomes you to join us in our mission to transform nuclear energy production in the United States and the world. The founder and president of Natura Resources, Douglass Robison, earlier founded and led oil and gas producer ExL Petroleum to sales of $2 billion at the height of the shale revolution.

Natura Resources, LLC brought together Abilene Christian University, The University of Texas at Austin, Texas A&M University, and Georgia Tech to form the Nuclear Energy eXperimental Testing Research Alliance (NEXTRA), a revolutionary partnership between public and private universities and private industry.  NEXTRA was established to design, build, and license the first-ever Molten Salt Research Reactor (MSRR) and the first university research reactor of any kind in the last 30 years.

Name: SGE S.A.
Description: Synthos Green Energy plans to deploy a fleet of Small Modular Reactors (SMR) nuclear power plants across Europe using the BWRX-300 designed by GE Vernova Hitachi Nuclear Energy.  The company is interested in producing affordable, on-demand, carbon-free electricity from a dependable, dedicated source.

Name: Fermi Energia
Description: We will bring Estonian energy production into the 21st century by developing a modern small nuclear power plant that will ensure Estonia's security of electricity supply in all weathers, a favorable price for electricity consumers and the fulfillment of the country's climate goals.

Name: Lightbridge Corporation
Description: Lightbridge is developing and commercializing next generation nuclear fuel technology that will significantly improve the economics and safety of existing and new reactors, with a meaningful impact on preventing climate change. The company also provides nuclear energy consulting services to commercial and governmental entities worldwide.

Name: Ringhals AB
Description:
Ringhals AB ligger på västkusten i Varbergs kommun, sex mil söder om Göteborg. Kärnkraftverket ingår i Vattenfallkoncernen och är ett av Nordens största kraftverk. Vi har över 50 års erfarenhet av fossilfri elproduktion och utvecklas ständigt. Vår medarbetarkultur präglas av kompetens, kunnande och positiva människor som vill dela med sig av sina kunskaper. 

På Ringhals arbetar ungefär 60 olika yrkesgrupper med att utveckla vår verksamhet och vårt arbetssätt för att kunna nå de krav som kunder och omvärld ställer på oss, varför vi ser individens utveckling som en stor del av företagets framtid. Hos oss erbjuds du personlig utveckling på en arbetsplats med många möjligheter. Välkommen till oss!

Name: Diablo Canyon Power Plant
Description: A safe, clean, reliable and vital energy resource for California providing low-cost, carbon-free electricity for more than three million people.

Name: Nuketech
Description: Nuketech is 100% dedicated to start-up with breakthrough technologies to help modernize and advance the nuclear energy sector. We focus on best-in-class software, new materials, robotics and any other project that will optimize the design, construction, exploitation, and dismantling of nuclear power plants, as well as minimize the quantity of radioactive waste.

Name: Nuclear Power Plants Authority(NPPA)
Description: The Nuclear Power Plants Authority was established by Law No.13 of the year 1976 and amendments by Law No. 210 of the year 2017, to be a public economic authority of special nature that is affiliated to the Ministry of Electricity and Renewable Energy. The Nuclear Power Plants Authority is exclusively entrusted with establishing, operating and managing nuclear power plants in Egypt and is headquartered in Cairo. The Authority has the national capabilities that are coupled with scientific competency and accumulated experiences necessary to successfully carry out its tasks in the management of nuclear power projects in the Arab Republic of Egypt.

Name: MoltexFLEX
Description:
We are a UK team of scientists and engineers, focused on the dual challenges of climate change – clean energy at affordable cost. 

We have designed a very simple nuclear reactor: it uses a fission reaction to produce heat at high temperatures. 

Our approach is to use the natural properties of the materials, tuning the chemistry and physics so that the reaction happens simply and safely. This isn’t complex engineering and sophisticated systems, it’s about simple, natural solutions.

The elegant appliance of science means that our device uses standard materials, has no moving parts and is inherently safe. It is easy to construct, install and operate, leading to low costs – lower than coal, oil or gas.

The heat: makes electricity; replaces fossil fuels in industries needing high temperatures; and produces hydrogen to replace gas or as the feedstock for new synthetic fuels.

These simple devices will contribute to every aspect of decarbonisation and on any scale – from single units to large arrays, from tens to thousands of megawatts. They will power data centres, desalination plants and steel foundries, or whole nations.

Name: KHNP Polska
Description: KHNP (Korea Hydro & Nuclear Power) to globalny lider bezpiecznej i niezawodnej energii oraz firma z prawie 50-letnim doświadczeniem w budowie i eksploatacji elektrowni jądrowych. Dzięki unikalnej wiedzy i kompetencjom KHNP współpracuje przy projektach i jest niezawodnym dostawcą reaktorów jądrowych. Obecnie firma eksploatuje 24 elektrownie jądrowe i buduje kolejne 8 reaktorów w Zjednoczonych Emiratach Arabskich i Korei. Jej najnowszej generacji reaktory APR1400 oferują najbardziej zaawansowane elementy bezpieczeństwa biernego i ochrony

Name: Rosatom America Latina
Description:
A Corporação Estatal de Energia Atômica ROSATOM é um dos líderes globais em tecnologia, e reúne mais de 300 empresas e organizações, incluindo a única frota de quebra-gelo nuclear do mundo . É uma das maiores empresas da Federação Russa, sendo a  maior empresa de geração de eletricidade no país, produzindo 202.868 bilhões de kWh de eletricidade em 2017. A ROSATOM detém o primeiro lugar para o maior portfólio de projetos de construção de usinas em países estrangeiros (35 Unidades de NPP em 12 países) e produz anualmente cerca de 3.000 toneladas de produção de urânio. A ROSATOM também fabrica equipamentos e produz isótopos para medicina nuclear, realiza pesquisas e estudos de novos materiais, produz supercomputadores e software, bem como diferentes produtos inovadores nucleares e não nucleares. 

ROSATOM  tem como o estratégia o desenvolvimento projetos de energia limpa, incluindo energia eólica. 


ROSATOM AMÉRICA LATINA

A América Latina é uma região prioritária para a Rosatom em termos de desenvolvimento cooperativo. O Escritório Regional do Rio de Janeiro é destinado a intensificar a cooperação com os parceiros da região, mediante ao apoio aos projetos em curso e a busca por novas oportunidades de cooperação com as empresas da América Latina, combinando a experiência regional com o produto especializado das divisões da Corporação Estatal.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Palo Verde Generating Station
Description:
Palo Verde Generating Station has been one of the nation’s largest power producers for nearly 30 years – all of it clean and carbon-free. As the heart of the APS generation fleet, it provides the foundation for the reliable service our customers know they can count on.

The plant is a critical asset to the Southwest, generating more than 32 million megawatt-hours annually – enough power for more than 4 million homes and businesses.

Name: ETC Global
Description:
ETC is an international high-tech company whose main business is the development, manufacturing and installation of gas centrifuges for uranium enrichment. ETC also delivers aluminium pipework solutions to its customers and is a provider of project management, plant design and engineering services. This makes ETC a highly specialized supplier within the nuclear power industry, making a significant contribution to the energy supply with low-carbon nuclear energy in numerous countries around the world. The company operates to the highest safety standards and closely protects its sensitive technology in a responsible manner.

ETC operates with its group companies also in other market sectors. Pronexos is an ETC venture that provides specialist manufacturing products and services to high-tech industries, with particular focus on carbon fibre products. Stornetic provides high-quality technology solutions in the form of flywheel systems with a focus on sustainable energy supply.

ETC currently employs around 1100 people across its five sites in Capenhurst (UK), Jülich (Germany), Almelo (Netherlands), Tricastin (France) and Eunice (USA) and is growing due to increasing global demand for low-carbon energy.

Name: PolyEnergetics
Description:
At PolyEnergetics, we believe the future of energy must be clean, scalable, and intelligent — and we’re building the tools to make that future a reality.

We are building solutions involving:
 • Digital Twin simulations
 • AI and Genetic Algorithms for intelligent design, monitoring, and automation
 • Advanced modeling tools to enhance safety, efficiency, and operational reliability

Our core focus areas include:
 • Designing new-age Small and Micro Modular Reactors (SMRs/MMRs) using AI-driven optimization
 • Developing operator training simulators for nuclear and thermal power plants
 • Enabling power plant efficiency optimization through real-time simulations

Name: DIET in Nuclear Conference
Description: The annual DIET Conference is a unique space where stakeholders and leaders from industry, academia, and government come together to exchange ideas, insights, and perspectives on cutting-edge technologies like artificial intelligence, machine learning, big data, digital twins, and more. The discussions also explore how these innovations can be regulated to ensure responsible and sustainable development across sectors.

Name: GTTSi
Description: Global Technical Training Services, Inc. (GTTSi) is a privately held South Carolina corporation and a women/minority owned small business.  We provide professional consulting and staffing services for nuclear energy, power utilities, wind, solar, and construction.  GTTSi specializes in all elements of training, operations, project management, engineering, procedures, inspection / testing, quality, & administration.  We have provided these services since 1980, serving 8 federal agencies, state agencies, prime contractors, and over 80% of the US commercial nuclear facilities.

Name: NuCube Energy
Description:
We are an innovative company that will transform how nuclear fission is used to power our society.
 
Nuclear energy is a practically unlimited source of carbon-free energy that can be used to generate heat and electricity.

Simplicity is the key to make this technology affordable and available everywhere.

NuCube is developing a new technology that, in its groundbreaking simplicity, will achieve the degree of affordability and safety which will make nuclear energy the natural complement for wind, solar and energy storage to achieve a sustainable future for humankind.

NuCube is building an international network of best-in-class engineers and researchers to deliver its promises to the market in the shortest time possible.

Name: Copenhagen Atomics, UK
Description:
Copenhagen Atomics, UK, part of Copenhagen Atomics, has developed a new type of reactor, which is safer, lower cost and can reduce nuclear waste. 

We plan to build many of these reactors in the UK, this will help the UK to become a global leader in high-tech and green energy while at the same time creating a large number of jobs.

For more information visit Copenhagen Atomics' social media or website
 
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/copenhagen-atomics/
Youtube: youtube.com/@CopenhagenAtomics?sub_confirmation=1
Website: copenhagenatomics.com

Name: Atoms For the Future
Description: La 15ème édition d'Atoms for the Future se déroulera le vendredi 03 octobre 2025! L'événement aura lieu aux Salons de l’Aveyron, Paris 12ème et rassemblera les jeunes professionnels et étudiants de la filière nucléaire.

Name: New Nuclear Watch Institute (NNWI)
Description:
NNWI is an industry supported think-tank, focused on the international development of nuclear energy as a means for governments to safeguard their long term sustainable energy needs. We strongly believe that nuclear is vital to achieving binding Paris Climate Agreement objectives and tackling the challenge of climate change. Since our inception, we have been recognised in the press as a high profile nuclear industry body working across the UK and European nuclear sector. 

We hope this think-tank, NNWI, will ensure that nuclear enegry remains at the forefront of debate. Assisting policymakers and the general public understand the vital need for nuclear energy in meeting our climate change objectives.

History

Founded by Tim Yeo at the end of 2014 as an interest group New Nuclear Watch Europe (NNWE), which was established to help ensure nuclear power is recognised as an important and desirable way for European governments to meet the long-term security needs of their countries. Since its inception, NNWE has been an industry leader in advocating for new build plant within the UK, Europe, and further afield. 

NNWE has evolved into the New Nuclear Watch Institute to promote the debate about all aspects of nuclear policy and, we hope, strengthen the case for more investment in nuclear.

Name: GIPNO Association Régionale de Partenaires
Description:
Créé en 2006, le GIP NO, l'association régionale de prestataires, est le relai entre EDF et les prestataires du nucléaire sur les CNPE de Flamanville, Paluel, Penly et Gravelines. 

L'association développe des actions dans les domaines de la Qualité, Sécurité, Radio-protection et Environnement (Q.S.R.E).

Elle intervient également dans les domaines de l'emploi compétences et formation, afin d'accompagner les prestataires intervenant sur les 4 CNPE.

Notre rôle : accompagner les salariés de nos adhérents sur toutes les exigences liées aux interventions en CNPE.

Name: Tunzini Maintenance Nucléaire
Description:
TUNZINI Maintenance Nucléaire intervient lors des opérations d’arrêts de tranche pour la réalisation des travaux mécaniques et de manutention de gros composants en bâtiments réacteurs, d’inspections et d’examens télévisuels et mesures radiologiques sous eau. 

En exploitation, nous développons un programme d’amélioration continue et d’innovation pour maximiser le taux de disponibilité des installations nucléaires et augmenter leur durée de vie. Nous disposons d’un savoir-faire éprouvé et d’une capacité à nous adapter au fonctionnement, au planning et besoins de nos clients.

TUNZINI MN
259-261 avenue Jean Jaures
69007 LYON

Name: Kärnfull Next (KNXT)
Description:
This is next-gen Nordic Nuclear – decarbonizing hydrogen, electricity, synfuels and heat. Also known as KNXT.

After pioneering 100% nuclear electricity contracts via Kärnfull Energi, we're now also changing the way advanced nuclear gets built.

Meeting an ever-increasing demand for fossil-free and reliable energy requires innovative thinking. Our entrepreneurial way of developing SMR new builds means we plan on becoming a major factor in solving Scandinavia's sustainability puzzle.

Small modular reactors mean greater flexibility than traditional nuclear, and delivery of clean, fossil-free energy in multiple forms – electricity, hydrogen, ammonia, synthetic fuels and heat – likely to become the fastest, cheapest and most eco-friendly way to decarbonize the energy sector.

Learn more and start your road to fossil freedom at knxt.se

Name: Constellation PowerLabs
Description:
Constellation PowerLabs has been performing quality calibrations and testing services since 1911. With our Quality Program we are ISO 17025 accredited, 10 CFR 50, Appendix B, 10 CFR 21, NQA-1 and ANSI N45.2. As a leader in the nuclear industry, we perform a full spectrum of calibration, testing, and analysis services including:
     • Calibrations – perform both standard and ISO 17025 calibrations
     • Failure Analysis – identify the root cause of a failed component
     • Parts Quality Testing – test functional parts and identify failed parts before entering inventory
     • Commercial Grade Dedication Testing – test plant safety related components 
     • Laser Scanning – create a 360-degree point cloud enabling a high level of accuracy

If you would like to learn more about services or receive a free quote, please contact powerlabs@constellation.com or call  (610) 380-2351.

Name: Curio LV
Description: At Curio we believe that we can tackle critical global issues facing humanity by innovating our way out of them. Having dedicated ourselves to the development of key nuclear technologies that produce a closed nuclear cycle, we believe the 2nd nuclear era is the future we've all been waiting for. With clean nuclear power at the foundation of its credo, Curio envisions a world where the United States is an energy exporter and a supplier of next-generation cancer therapies at humanitarian pricing for all.

Name: SPIN - Société des Professionnels Italiens du Nucléaire en France
Description:
𝑆𝑜𝑐𝑖𝑒́𝑡𝑒́ 𝑑𝑒𝑠 𝑃𝑟𝑜𝑓𝑒𝑠𝑠𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑛𝑒𝑙𝑠 𝐼𝑡𝑎𝑙𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑠 𝑑𝑢 𝑁𝑢𝑐𝑙𝑒́𝑎𝑖𝑟𝑒 𝑒𝑛 𝐹𝑟𝑎𝑛𝑐𝑒 (𝑆𝑃𝐼𝑁) [Society of Italian Nuclear Professionals in France] is a French association which aims to represent, increase visibility and provide networking opportunities to the community of Italian professionals in the French nuclear energy sector.

After taking its first steps in the second half of 2022, the association was officially launched in early 2023.

Have a look at the association manifesto here: http://bit.ly/manifestoSPIN_ENG_linkedIn.

Follow us to stay tuned for the latest news about SPIN's activities.

Contact us if you are an Italian professional in the French nuclear energy sector (active or retired) and interested in taking part.

 reseau@spinfrance.org
 www.spinfrance.org

Name: Platom
Description:
Platom on erityisasiantuntijoiden tiimi, jonka tehtävänä on hallita ydinvoima-alan haastavimmat kokonaisuudet sekä tuottaa alalle turvallisia ratkaisuja ja kannattavia toimintamalleja. Olemme riippumaton, joustava ja kokenut asiantuntijatoimisto. Toimimme tiiviissä yhteistyössä viranomaisen, luvanhaltijoiden ja toimittajien kanssa. Haluamme jättää jälkeemme elinvoimaisia ratkaisuja, joilla varmistamme turvallisemman huomisen. Tämän eteen olemme tehneet periksiantamatonta työtä ydinvoima-alalla jo yli 25 vuotta.


Platom consists of a team of experts, whose task is to control the most challenging aspects of the nuclear industry, in addition to producing safe and cost-effective solutions. We are an independent, flexible and experienced consultancy company. We work in close cooperation with the authorities, licensees and suppliers. We envision our legacy in vital solutions that ensure a safer tomorrow. Toward this goal we have strived for over 25 years in the nuclear industry.

Name: Ineo Nuclear
Description:
Ineo Nuclear, a subsidiary of the Equans France, supports all major players in the nuclear industry with multi-technical solutions for new build, retrofits, maintenance and operation, as well as decommissioning.
Attentive to clients’ needs, our teams offer a wide range of products and technical expertise to meet your on-site operational performance expectations in terms of nuclear safety, lead times and costs. We support you at all stages in the lifecycle of your assets.
Multi-technical services, integrated services and technological expertise at the heart of INEO Nuclear's entrepreneurial approach

Name: Asociación Nuclear Ascó-Vandellós II (ANAV)
Description: La Asociación Nuclear Ascó Vandellós II es una Agrupación de Interés Económico participada por Endesa y Iberdrola que gestiona las centrales nucleares Ascó y Vandellós II en la provincia de Tarragona (Catalunya, España).

Name: Torus Nuclear
Description:
Torus Nuclear: Engineering the Future of Energy

At Torus Nuclear, we bridge the gap between concept and reality—delivering the expertise, strategy, and talent that bring advanced energy projects to life.

Our Services

FOAK Design & Engineering
Transforming innovative ideas into licensable, buildable facility plans for next-generation energy systems.

Regulatory Strategy
Guiding projects through complex licensing processes with structured, expert-led regulatory roadmaps.

Comprehensive Audits
Assessing readiness and identifying technical and financial risks to ensure smooth project execution.

Workforce Augmentation
Providing on-demand engineering talent to meet specialized project needs quickly and efficiently.

Additional Capabilities

Engineering Consulting
Project Management • Nuclear Support • Field & Commissioning • CAD Design • Power Systems Analysis

Hiring Solutions
Talent Acquisition • Team Augmentation • Workforce Development • Candidate Nurturing

Our Mission

To de-risk innovation by connecting visionary energy projects with world-class engineering expertise.

Innovation & Sustainability

We leverage AI, data analytics, and digital design to drive sustainable, high-performance energy solutions.

Join Our Network

Partner with us—or join our team—to help build the future of clean energy.

Name: U.S. Women in Nuclear (U.S. WIN)
Description:
Positioning the United States for the future of nuclear energy and technology through the advancement of women

U.S. Women in Nuclear Strategic Objectives
* Attract a diverse workforce to pursue professions and trades in the nuclear sector
* Foster a culture of inclusion and belonging that retains a diverse workforce in the nuclear sector
* Create professional development and networking opportunities for career advancement
* Inspire advocacy and public support for the advancement of nuclear energy and technology.

Specialties: Diversity, Equity, & Inclusion | Professional Development | Networking | Public Outreach

Name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nuclear Energy
Description:
The Nuclear Energy All-Party Parliamentary Group provides a forum for parliamentarians, industry and government to discuss the challenges and opportunities relating to nuclear energy.

We focus on speaking to industry representation to understand better the opportunities new gigawatt-scale and SMR projects will offer the UK, including the scope of possibilities the nuclear industry provides outside the power sector (for example, heat or hydrogen). 

Working with the civil nuclear industry, we can assist the UK Government in developing better legislation for nuclear power that will drive forward the UK's ambition to achieve Net Zero and ensure a secure domestic energy supply for future generations.

Name: BNS-YG - Belgian Nuclear Society Young Generation
Description: The Belgian Nuclear Society Young Generation (BNS-YG) brings together young professionals and students interested in nuclear science. So whether you are young or young at heart, we are happy to welcome you at the BNS-YGN LinkedIn page and our events.

Name: Exodys Energy
Description: Exodys Energy is an engineering firm developing closed-loop nuclear systems to recycle Used Nuclear Fuel to supply clean energy.

Name: KHNP Czech
Description: KHNP (Korea Hydro & Nuclear Power Co., Ltd.) - globální lídr spolehlivé energie. Váš partner pro jadernou energii.

Name: Dominion Engineering, Inc.
Description:
Dominion Engineering, Inc., a division of Allied Power, has over 40 years of experience delivering innovative field service equipment and technology to support nuclear utilities and operators. Dominion Engineering focuses on improving plant performance and reliability while increasing the efficiency of refueling outages, decommissioning, and waste management activities.

The Allied Power Platform, comprising Dominion Engineering and RSCS, combines industry-leading engineering, component integrity, asset management, and radiological protection services. This integrated approach enables our customers to enhance workplace safety and operational efficiency while addressing complex challenges with practical solutions.

Name: Dual Fluid
Description:
Dual Fluid energy is low-emission and requires very little space or resources. We are creating an inherently safe nuclear reactor that
•	provides electricity at a lower cost than fossil fuel power plants,
•	turns nuclear waste into electricity,
•	produces clean, low-cost hydrogen and synthetic fuels.
Our patented, disruptive design will provide low-cost energy in abundance. For the very first time, even emerging markets could have a clean, cheap and reliable alternative to fossil fuels. This makes sustainable development truly possible.

Name: Fermi Solutions
Description: Fermi Solutions Inc delivers quality, cost-effective, and technology-driven engineering services that range from technical consultations to field delivery and implementation. With specialization in CANDU systems, we provide complete Project Life Cycle ‘Cradle to Grave’ Engineering services for CANDU-related challenges from concept development, ECC Design, field execution, and system turnover. Our team is capable of  covering every aspect of our Client’s program or project, including project management, procurement, consulting, and alternative project delivery.

Name: ARCHEOS
Description:
Projet de réacteur calogène pour fournir de la chaleur décarbonée et compétitive aux acteurs de l'agro-alimentaire, aux industries nécessitant de la vapeur basse température et aux collectivités.
Les objectifs d'ARCHEOS : une forte sûreté intrinsèque, une simplicité de conception et de fabrication, une facilité d'installation sur tout le territoire et une rapidité de déploiement.
Le positionnement d'ARCHEOS est pragmatique et réutilise des briques technologiques déjà éprouvées pour limiter les temps de développement et les risques associés.

Name: Boston Atomics
Description: Boston Atomics is solving the construction cost challenge in the nuclear industry with an innovative design strategy. Building on the high TRL of high-temperature-gas-reactor technology, with a design for constructability approach, we are bringing high temperature nuclear heat to the industrial process heat market to decarbonize plastics, chemicals, fertilizers, and more.

Name: Swedish Nuclear Society
Description:
Swedish Nuclear Society (SKS) is a non-profit association for anyone with an interest in nuclear technology.

The purpose of SKS is:

To highlight the benefits of nuclear technology as an important alternative in the development of a global, sustainable, and environmentally responsible world
To encourage the exchange of experiences and knowledge within the nuclear technology field,
To maintain a network for personal and career growth

What does SKS do?

Organizes activities for its members, such as study visits to nuclear facilities, conferences, networking events, etc.
The association acts as a consultative body and reviews proposals from authoritative bodies, such as regulators or the government. 
Promote factbased knowledge exchange via social media, articles, reports, etc.

Name: Torus
Description:
Welcome to Torus, a leader in engineering consulting and hiring. We are dedicated to fostering innovation, diversity, and excellence within the engineering sector. With a legacy of over a century, we have built a reputation for connecting top-tier engineering talent with transformative opportunities across various industries.

𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗠𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻: We bridge the gap between exceptional engineering talent and the dynamic needs of the industry, creating an inclusive environment where professionals from diverse backgrounds can thrive.

𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘀𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴: Project Management, Nuclear Engineering Support, Field/Commissioning Support, CAD Drafting, Design Engineering, Power System Analysis.

𝗛𝗶𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗦𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: Talent Acquisition, Team Augmentation, Workforce Development, Candidate Nurturing.

𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝘀𝗲: Our team comprises seasoned professionals with extensive experience in various engineering disciplines, allowing us to understand and meet the intricate needs of our clients' projects.

𝗜𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: We continuously invest in the latest technologies and methodologies to enhance our services. From AI and machine learning to big data analytics and IoT integration, we are at the forefront of digital transformation in engineering.

𝗦𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆: We promote sustainable practices and ensure our projects contribute positively to the environment. Our focus includes renewable energy projects, energy efficiency, and thorough environmental impact assessments.

𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀: We work with diverse clients across industries like utilities, oil and gas, renewable energy, and manufacturing, delivering customized solutions that drive success.

𝗝𝗼𝗶𝗻 𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗧𝗲𝗮𝗺: We offer a dynamic and inclusive work environment, committed to professional development and growth. Explore our current job openings to join a team that values innovation and excellence.

Name: ETC Deutschland
Description:
Über ETC (Enrichment Technology Company)

ETC ist ein internationales High-Tech-Unternehmen, dessen Hauptgeschäft die Entwicklung, Herstellung und Installation von Gaszentrifugen zur Urananreicherung ist. ETC liefert seinen Kunden dafür auch Aluminiumrohrleitungen und ist ein Anbieter von Projektmanagement-, Anlagendesign- und Ingenieurdienstleistungen. Dies macht ETC zu einem hochspezialisierten Anbieter innerhalb der Kernenergiebranche, der in zahlreichen Ländern der Welt einen wesentlichen Beitrag zur Energieversorgung mit CO2-armer Kernenergie leistet. Das Unternehmen arbeitet nach den höchsten Sicherheitsstandards und schützt seine sensible Technologie auf verantwortungsvolle Weise. 

ETC ist mit seinen Tochtergesellschaften auch in anderen Marktsegmenten tätig. Pronexos ist ein ETC-Unternehmen, das spezialisierte Fertigungsprodukte und -dienstleistungen für High-Tech-Industrien mit besonderem Schwerpunkt auf Carbonfaserprodukte anbietet. Stornetic bietet hochwertige Technologielösungen in Form von Schwungradsystemen mit Fokus auf nachhaltige Energieversorgung. 

ETC beschäftigt derzeit rund 1.000 Mitarbeitende an fünf Standorten in Capenhurst (Großbritannien), Jülich (Deutschland), Almelo (Niederlande), Tricastin (Frankreich) und Eunice (USA) und wächst aufgrund der weltweit steigenden Nachfrage nach CO2-armer Energie.

Name: World Nuclear Forum
Description:
We are the international institution for public-private cooperation in nuclear affairs.

We convene global nuclear stakeholders through high-level forums, research programs, strategic initiatives, and digital platforms. We operate as a non-profit, impartial, and independent entity.

We facilitate dialogue and collaboration among industry, government, and civil society to advance responsible nuclear development and governance.

Name: RadSafe Canada Ltd.
Description:
RadSafe is a privately owned and operated Canadian company providing radiation protection services and training in support of both short-term and long-term projects. Established in 2001, RadSafe has provided radiation protection services to many of the country's leading nuclear companies, allowing RadSafe to build a reputation as a reliable, responsible and professional organization capable of taking on leadership roles within the field of radiation protection. 
Based in Pembroke, Ontario, we have completed work throughout Canada where radiation protection support is required. We have extensive experience working within the radiological field including assignments at nuclear research and power generation facilities, waste remediation sites, hospitals, mines and universities. We have an exceptional safety record and a management structure that supports our financial, human and project management requirements.

Name: Global Forum for Nuclear Innovation
Description:
The Global Forum for Nuclear Innovation (GFNI) 2024 was hosted in Miami by EPRI, Florida Power & Light, the IAEA, NNL, NextEra Energy, and the NEA. 

GFNI is a conference uniting likeminded people from all over the world on a collective mission to put nuclear at the heart of the world's low-carbon energy future.

GFNI 2024 was designed to change behaviors, inspire action, and challenge the status quo. This innovative experience continued the GFNI journey, started in 2019 and continued in 2022, by equipping participants from across the nuclear industry with the right tools to help drive innovation and continuous improvement in the industry.

Name: 18for0
Description: 18for0 is a voluntary group of professionals concerned about the credibility of current proposals to achieve net zero emissions in Ireland by 2050.

Name: Rosatom in South Asia
Description: Regional Centre in South Asia of Russian State Atomic Power Corporation ROSATOM.

Name: Ultra Safe Nuclear Corporation
Description: Ultra Safe Nuclear Corporation

Name: PT Thorcon Power Indonesia
Description:
PT Thorcon Power Indonesia was founded in 2021 as a totally owned
foreign direct investment company (PMA) by Thorcon International Pte,
Ltd, which has had a Representative Office in Jakarta, Indonesia since
2018 and was previously known as Martingale Inc from 2015 to 2018. PT
Thorcon Power Indonesia is based in Jakarta’s Sudirman Central
Business District (SCBD) complex and employs 15 people with a variety of
technical backgrounds.

Thorcon has signed several Agreements and MOUs with various
stakeholders in the energy and nuclear sector, including universities and
state-owned companies, through its Representative Office of Thorcon
International, Pte. Ltd. It has also engaged and has had extensive
communication with nearly every Government Ministries and
Institutions involved in the energy and nuclear sector as well as many
Provincial Governments and the Energy Commission of the Indonesian
House of Representatives.

Thorcon has gained strong traction with the Indonesian Government as
the only nuclear firm in the country proposing to build a power plant
through private investment. This is evidenced by the Government's letter
to Thorcon welcoming the planned 500 MW power plant
implementation and offering guidance for how Thorcon should proceed.
Thorcon is in a good position to become the first company to build and
operate an Indonesian nuclear power plant.

Name: Risk Pilot AB
Description:
Risk Pilot offers consulting services in all areas related to risk management with a focus on risks in the power industry.

Our services include mainly technical and organizational risk analysis, but we also perform economic risk assessments, accident investigations and conduct courses and seminars in the field of risk management.

Risk Pilot was established in 2003 with the aim to offer our employee’s deep knowledge in risk management to the market. Risk Pilot combines strong expertise in risk management in technical and economic systems with unique expertise in risk management in organizations.

The foundation of Risk Pilot consists of deep knowledge and extensive experience in technical, financial and organizational risk assessments, which mainly are implemented in the nuclear industry, which has a long tradition of high requirements on risk management.

Name: HALEU Energy Fuel
Description:
HALEU Energy Fuel Inc., a subsidiary of NANO Nuclear Energy is focused on the development and manufacture of High Assayed Low Enriched Uranium (HALEU). Given the current civilian nuclear fuel landscape, HALEU Energy Fuel has identified major challenges for fueling its anticipated portable micro reactors and is looking to invest its resources into developing enrichment facilities and securing enriched fuel.

The company has identified an opportunity to work in combination with the U.S. national nuclear labs to provide the country with additional sources of enriched nuclear fuel for its domestic and commercial nuclear industry development.

The Company is seeking collaboration with international industry and government involved in the enrichment of nuclear fuel, for the purposes of understanding the development challenges and resource requirements to realize a successful enrichment program. The company intends to assist in the financing, staffing, and support of these projects to develop and deliver long-term and consistent sources of enriched uranium.

Name: Deep Atomic
Description:
Deep Atomic is revolutionizing the way AI data centers are powered. Leveraging our groundbreaking small modular nuclear reactors and integrated data center cooling design, we provide a reliable and sustainable energy source that meets the high demands of modern AI technologies. 

Our innovative, fully modular design combined with a unique delivery model ensures that AI data centers can operate with unprecedented efficiency and minimal environmental impact. With Deep Atomic, power your AI operations with clean, cost-effective energy and lead the charge towards a sustainable technological future.

Name: UCAN Power - United Coalition for Advanced Nuclear Power
Description: UCAN Power is the voice within the nuclear technology community that is focused solely on the advancement of small and micro nuclear reactors and their applications across the spectrum of needs. As reactor size is dramatically decreased, the opportunity to utilize nuclear power will continue to increase. This coming technology shift must be guided by market signals and responsible government policies grounded in science and communicated from a credible coalition of advocates to maximize the forthcoming growth opportunity.

Name: KELLAL Maintenance (une entreprise VINCI Energies)
Description: KELLAL Maintenance est spécialiste de la Manutention de Combustible Nucléaire, de l'Etude d'un projet à la Maintenance des installations.

Name: First American Nuclear
Description:
Leading the American Energy Revolution.

The scientists, engineers, and operators who created many of the advanced reactors in America now ushering in the age of cost-effective nuclear energy.

The only modern reactor design that delivers the benefits of clean, cost-effective, and firm nuclear energy at a cost competitive with natural gas and renewables.

We don’t chase the theoretical. We build what works

Name: BNS - Belgian Nuclear Society
Description: The Belgian Nuclear Society is a “learned society” (société savante) for the exchange and enhancement of science and know-how of its members. It was founded in 1970 as the local section of the ANS uniting students, post-docs and nuclear professionals. The BNS promotes the advancement of science and engineering related to peaceful applications of nuclear energy.

Name: Atomic Energy Agency under the Cabinet of Ministers of the Republic of Uzbekistan (Uzatom)
KOYA Nuclear Energy
Description: KOYA Nuclear Energy collaborates with industry leaders, technology providers, and strategic partners to accelerate the deployment of TRISO nuclear fuel and Gen IV Small Modular Reactors (SMRs) globally. Our mission is to drive innovation, reduce costs and time to market, and ensure a reliable supply of TRISO nuclear fuel and advanced SMRs to meet the growing demand for clean energy.

Name: Česká nukleární společnost
Description:
Česká nukleární společnost (ČNS) je dobrovolnou a neziskovou odbornou organizací v rámci Českého svazu vědeckotechnických společností. Hlavním cílem ČNS je propojovat českou jadernou komunitu, provádět osvětu a napomáhat vzdělávání veřejnosti v  oblasti mírového využívání jaderné energie.

ČNS sdružuje jak individuální členy z řad zájemců o problematiku jaderné energetiky, tak i organizace, školy, výzkumné ústavy, výrobní a dodavatelské společnosti.

ČNS byla založena v roce 1990 skupinou předních odborníků Ústavu jaderného výzkumu v Řeži. Současně se zapojila i do odborných struktur v rámci Evropy a stala se členem Evropské nukleární společnosti, která sdružuje 34 zemí. Ve středoevropském regionu dlouhodobě a úzce spolupracuje se Slovenskou nukleární společností (SNUS) a německou nukleární společností (KTG). Hlavní náplní této spolupráce je pravidelné pořádání konferencí NUSIM (Nuclear Societies Information Meeting). Tyto konference probíhají od roku 1992 (Praha) střídavě na území jednotlivých států. ČNS dále organizuje významné mezinárodní konference a pracovní setkání na republikové úrovni. Výraznou aktivitu v ČNS projevují mladí (Mladá generace ČNS) a dále sdružení Ženy v jádře (WiN).

Name: United Controls International
Description:
United Controls International was established as a division of Reliance Electric in 1971 and was later spun off as an independent company. 

With 50 years of experience supplying dedication and qualification services to the nuclear power industry, UCI has consistently provided quality service and products to companies all over the world.  We supply a comprehensive range of safety related items and services, including: seismic qualification; harsh environment qualification; such as radiation, LOCA, and thermal testing; EMI/RFI qualification; and commercial grade dedication.  UCI also performs many types of material testing in our material testing lab, including; XRF, FTIR, Rockwell Hardness, Micro-Hardness and Durometer Shore A.  Additionally, UCI assists plants with obsolescence issues, provides re-engineering services, and also provides engineering consulting services.  

UCI is the only source for Nuketape, which is qualified for harsh environment applications within nuclear power plants. 

UCI meets the highest standards of quality control established by the nuclear industry and other standards authorities. UCI maintains a 10CFR50 Appendix B program audited by NUPIC & NIAC. UCI has designed, manufactured, tested and installed systems in scores of nuclear power generation plants around the world. UCI maintains a database of thousands of nuclear qualified parts and electrical components that we have tested, dedicated and qualified. UCI has an extensive array of test equipment, an experienced engineering staff and is able to offer a broad range of testing services.

Name: Emerald Horizon AG
Description:
Emerald Horizon is pioneering the generation of safe, CO2-free electricity on a scalable and self-sufficient scale, addressing one of the biggest challenges of the 21st century. The AG was founded in 2019 by the two investors and co-founders of Qbasis Invest Florian Wagner and Philipp Pölzl in Graz, Austria, due to a lack of promising investment opportunities in green energy. 

Emerald Horizon's main focus is the development of an advanced nuclear power plant using thorium feedstock that fits into a standard shipping container and generates 25 MW of thermal heat (ADES). ADES' advanced nuclear technology consists of a unique combination of mainly existing and proven components. 

The company is also developing a heat storage system (CALstore) together with the Bernard Group and the Institute of Thermal Engineering at Graz University of Technology. 

Emerald Horizon is rounding off its offering with photovoltaic contracting, thus already providing low-cost green electricity today.

Name: TOROMEGA UK Ltd
Description:
We provide a full range of services for the nuclear industry in operation, maintenance and decommissioning of nuclear power plants, including the supply of skilled workers according to specific needs. Majority of our team gained experience in the operation and decommissioning of the Ignalina Nuclear Power Plant (Lithuania). The decommissioning of the plant started in 2010 and brought unique expertise and opportunities for thousands of its highly skilled engineers. Since then, a lot of them have been in great demand and gained versatile practice in complex nuclear projects. We manufacture, commission and operate specially designed technologies for decontamination and provide client-tailored solutions for any D&D projects. 
Along with the services provided for the nuclear industry, we have kept a keen focus on company development and thus gained a substantial experience in many other areas including, but not limited to the following services – insulation, surface treatment and coating, and general construction works.

Name: TVO Nuclear Services Oy Ltd
Description:
TVO Nuclear Services (TVONS) provides consultation services in the nuclear energy industry. 

We offer the expertise of Olkiluoto professionals concentrated on various aspects of the nuclear energy business. 

TVO Nuclear Services is a subsidiary of Teollisuuden Voima Oyj (TVO), an independent privately owned operator, licensee, and owner of three NPP's in Finland. 

We use highly skilled specialists for consultation and development services. 
Our services cover New Build projects, Radioactive Waste, Nuclear Safety, Performance Improvement, Training, and Olkiluoto Accommodation village.

Name: Lions Global
Description:
We believe that access to energy is a human right.

Lions Global partners with governments and industry leaders to deliver clean, reliable, and resilient baseload energy solutions that enable long-term prosperity, energy sovereignty, and environmental stewardship.
We specialize in the development and implementation of tailored clean energy roadmaps — with a strong emphasis on civil nuclear power — to advance long-term energy security, climate resilience, and economic transformation.

Our work supports:

Positive economic development, including infrastructure investment, job creation, and industrial modernization

Global clean energy participation, aligned with national goals and international climate commitments

Sustainable development practices, integrating life-cycle thinking, waste minimization, and circular economy principles

Capacity building and knowledge transfer, fostering long-term local expertise and institutional resilience

Investor confidence and international cooperation, through robust, transparent planning and high-integrity project delivery

Lions Global helps clients shape energy strategies that not only meet today’s demands, but also build the foundation for a low-carbon, resource-efficient, and future-ready economy.

Name: Cwmni Egino
Description:
Cwmni datblygu safle Trawsfynydd | Trawsfynydd site development company

Mae Cwmni Egino yn gwmni sydd ym mherchnogaeth Llywodraeth Cymru, sy'n datblygu cynigion ar gyfer adeiladu Adweithydd Modiwlar Bach cyntaf y DU ar safle'r hen orsaf bwer niwclear yn Nhrawsfynydd. Ein nod yw hybu cyfleoedd adfywio economaidd a chymdeithasol yn lleol, rhanbarthol a chenedlaethol, yn ogystal â chyfrannu at dargedau sero net a sicrwydd ynni'r DU.

Cwmni Egino is a Welsh Government owned company tasked with developing proposals for the deployment of the UK’s first SMR at the site of the former nuclear power station in Trawsfynydd, North Wales. Our plans will maximise socio-economic growth opportunities locally, regionally and nationally, as well as help meet the UK’s energy security and net zero targets.
